name: Savory Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté the first five ingredients in oil in a large Dutch oven until tender.
2. Add ground beef and brown, stirring to crumble meat. Drain well.
3. Add tomato sauce and the next five ingredients to the beef mixture; stir well.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 30 minutes or to desired consistency.
5. Add beans during the last 15 minutes of cooking.
Serve with shredded lettuce, shredded Cheddar cheese, diced onion, and tortilla chips if desired. Yield: 10 cups.
